name: Ukraine
headline: Ukraine CARRY-FORWARD CONFIRMATION at 50.0 / Functional. Day 6 of asymmetric-conduct arc (May 14-19). May 18 oil-refinery long-range strike pattern continues; Kyiv stated $7B damage to Russian oil sector in 2026 (Zelensky); systematic targeting of Baltic/Black Sea oil-loading ports. Asymmetric-targeting distinction sustained (energy/military-economic infrastructure under IHL Article 52 vs Russia's civilian-residential targeting). Xi-Putin Beijing summit context (May 19-20) generates strategic pressure but no observed Ukrainian targeting shift. Functional band sustained.

ACT.rationale: Sustained. AC4 resource mobilization: $7B cumulative damage to Russian oil sector in 2026 (Zelensky) demonstrates sustained long-range-precision capability against military-economic targets. Pattern consolidation, not new dimensional weight.

BND.rationale: Sustained. Asymmetric-targeting distinction preserved: energy/military-economic infrastructure (Baltic/Black Sea oil-loading ports, refineries) vs Russia's continued civilian-residential targeting (Odesa kindergarten/lyceum May 18).

INT.rationale: Sustained. I1 consistency-under-pressure: 6-day asymmetric-conduct arc sustained through Xi-Putin summit pressure window without targeting shift.

evidence.finding: Zelensky: $7B cumulative damage to Russian oil sector in 2026. Ukraine targeting Baltic/Black Sea oil-loading ports.
Ukraine hit Russia's Perm refinery with long-range drones; sustained energy-infrastructure targeting campaign.
Largest Ukrainian long-range drone strike on Russian oil refinery near Moscow; 4 killed (collateral damage), 12+ wounded.

keyEvidence: $7B cumulative damage to Russian oil sector in 2026 (Zelensky).
Baltic/Black Sea oil-loading port targeting (energy/military-economic infrastructure).
Asymmetric-targeting distinction preserved vs Russia's civilian-residential targeting (Odesa kindergarten/lyceum May 18).
Xi-Putin summit window pressure absorbed without targeting shift.
Functional band sustained at 50.0; no score change.
rationale: Carry-forward confirmation at 50.0. Day-6 extension of asymmetric-conduct arc; pattern consolidation within Functional band. The Zelensky $7B figure and the Perm refinery targeting are evidence of sustained capability/scope but not new dimensional category. The arc's pressure test (Xi-Putin summit window) was absorbed without targeting shift, which is the strongest I1 consistency-under-pressure signal of the cycle. Math: (3+3+3.5+2.5+3+3+3+3)/8 = 24/8 = 3.0 → ((3.0-1)/4)*100 = 50.0.
whyHeadline: Ukraine day-6 asymmetric arc sustained through Xi-Putin summit pressure window; $7B Russian oil-sector damage cumulative.

dominantDimension.note: INT carries the strongest comparative signal — 6-day targeting-discipline sustained under summit-window pressure.

watches: Russian retaliatory escalation to refinery campaign
ICC engagement on Russian post-ceasefire civilian targeting
Western military aid signals (long-range capability sourcing)
carryForward: Sub-anchor: oil-refinery + oil-loading-port targeting as energy/military-economic-infrastructure reference
boundaryWatchResolution: Not a boundary case. 50.0 sits at midpoint of Functional (41-60).
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
